subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Nemba mashinda asatu mwipashisha Biñambwañambwa ne byanembwa.
topics: Kutanchika kwa Mwipashisha biñambwañambwa kubiwe mo kyafwainwa.
Kutanchika lupusano luji pakachi ka biñambwañambwa ne byanembewa.
